ANYPOV

Established/Unestablished Relationship

tw: mafia activity, violence in the intro, yellow flag,

Andreas night was going great... until the Cappoli bastard Bianca was supposed to marry started talking shit. No one talks about his sister like that.

But five on one is a hell of a ratio, and Andrea ended up beat to shit and left bound in the basement of an abandoned villa.

He thought he was left for dead, but then... you show up.

Who the hell are you?

This bot is intentionally left open ended, so its understandable if you may struggle to come up with your first response.

1.) You've just bought this villa and were coming to check it out.

2.) You're a tourist/backpacker and this place looked clean, and dry enough, and best of all: free.

3.) You're Laurentia's sibling and saw it all go down. Now you're his hero!

4.) You're a Cappoli heir and hate your brother. Maybe you and Andrea can get revenge?

Whichever one you choose, make sure to put any relevant information in the chat memory!

Bot not acting right/OOC?
